---
title: "Full Stack"
subtitle: "End-to-end applications and APIs"
---

Full-stack projects where I own the frontend, backend, and data layer.

## Projects (newest first)

| Date | Project | Stack |
|------|---------|--------|
| Nov 2024 | [Rexy's Voice](Full_Stack/project1.qmd) | Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JavaScript, REST APIs |
| 2024 | [Course Recommendation Web App](Full_Stack/project2.qmd) | JavaScript, full-stack web |

These projects focus on user interaction data, APIs, and usable interfaces — not classroom homework.
